name:
天音かなた
(Amane Kanata)
text:
Oshi Skill holo Power -3: Squish Squish
[1/Turn]Set the opponent's center holomem's remaining HP to 50.

SP Oshi Skill holo Power -2: I'll squish you!
[1/Game]During this turn, 1 of your holomem gets Arts+50. Then, if that holomem's color is white, it gets Arts+50.

name:
七詩ムメイ
(Nanashi Mumei)
text:
Oshi Skill holo Power -2: Guardian of Civilization
[1/Turn]Usable if your holomem with #Promise would take Damage from the opponent during the opponent's turn:1 of those holomem takes -50 Damage.

SP Oshi Skill holo Power -2: Amazing Drawing
[1/Game]Reveal 1 event from your deck, and add it to hand. Then, shuffle the deck.

name:
アキ・ローゼンタール
(Aki Rosenthal)
text:
Oshi Skill holo Power -2: Survival Power
[1/Turn]Reveal 1 <Stone Axe> from your deck, and attach it to your green holomem. Then, shuffle the deck.

SP Oshi Skill holo Power -2: Song of the Earth
[1/Game]Restore all HP of your green center holomem.

name:
兎田ぺこら
(Usada Pekora)
text:
Oshi Skill holo Power -2: Little Wild Rabbits~
[1/Turn]Usable if your holomem is downed during the opponent's turn:Reattach all green cheers from 1 of your downed holomem divided as you choose to your other holomems.

SP Oshi Skill holo Power -3: Lucky Rabbit
[1/Game]During this turn, regard all numbers on the faces of your dice as 6.

name:
鷹嶺ルイ
(Takane Lui)
text:
Oshi Skill holo Power -X: Female Commanding Officer
[1/Turn]Usable if you would archive cards from hand by your red holomem's ability:You may archive 1 of your holo Power instead for each hand card to be archived.

SP Oshi Skill holo Power -2: Hawkeye
[1/Game]During your opponent's next turn, your opponent's center holomem and collab holomem cannot Baton Pass, move, or swap.

name:
小鳥遊キアラ
(Takanashi Kiara)
text:
Oshi Skill holo Power -2: Phoenix Tail
[1/Turn]Return 1 holomem from your archive to hand.

SP Oshi Skill holo Power -2: Rise from the Ashes
[1/Game]Usable if your red holomem is downed during your opponent's turn:You take -1 Life Damage. Then, choose 1 downed card, and return all of the stacked holomem including that holomem to hand.

[there is also a SEC version available, which is a signed version of the OUR]

name:
星街すいせい
(Hoshimachi Suisei)
text:
Oshi Skill holo Power -2: Comet
[1/Turn]Usable when this Oshi holomem or your blue holomem deals Damage to your opponent's back holomem:Deal 50 Special Damage to that back holomem.

SP Oshi Skill holo Power -2: Shooting Star
[1/Game]Usable when your blue holomem deals Damage to your opponent's center holomem or collab holomem:Deal the same amount of Special Damage to 1 of your opponent's back holomem.

[there is also a SEC version available, which is a signed version of the OUR]
